transcript: Add eggs to some boiling water and you will be surprised by the result. In a pan filled with boiling water, start by adding 5 beaten eggs. Remove the eggs from the water using a fine mesh strainer. Next, add 1 drizzle of vegetable oil, 1 medium onion, 3 crushed garlic cloves, add half green bell pepper, chopped into small cubes, half red bell pepper, also chopped into small cubes, 1 ripe tomato, chopped into small cubes, one teaspoon of salt, one pinch of black pepper, half teaspoon of cumin. Now to arrange the recipe, put all the eggs we made in a nice serving dish. Add the sauteed vegetables we made and spread evenly until flat. That recipe is ready. You may now serve and enjoy it. Thank you for sharing this recipe. See you next recipe. Bye.
